title: Muddula Mogudu
overview: Muddula Mogudu is a 1997 Telugu drama film produced by K. Nageswara Rao under the Ramaa films banner, presented by Kaikala Satyanayana and directed by A. Kodandarami Reddy. It stars Nandamuri Balakrishna, Meena, Ravali in the lead roles and music composed by Koti.
